member.name: T:Prime.MultiTrialTestService.IMultiTrialTestService
member.summary: This is the interface of the MultiTrialTest Service.

member.name: M:Prime.MultiTrialTestService.IMultiTrialTestService.SetTrialVariableResetValue(System.String,System.String,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Sets specified trial variable's reset value. If value exceeds multi trial flow's max flow item index, API still return true but an error will be generated on hdmtOS GUI.

member.name: M:Prime.MultiTrialTestService.IMultiTrialTestService.SetTrialVariableCurrentValue(System.String,System.String,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Sets specified trial variable's current value. If value exceeds multi trial flow's max flow item index, API still return true but an error will be generated on hdmtOS GUI.

member.name: M:Prime.MultiTrialTestService.IMultiTrialTestService.GetTrialVariableResetValue(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets specified trial variable's reset value.

member.name: M:Prime.MultiTrialTestService.IMultiTrialTestService.GetTrialVariableCurrentValue(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets specified trial variable's current value.

member.name: M:Prime.MultiTrialTestService.UserVariables.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Prime.MultiTrialTestService.UserVariables.MultiTrialTestVariables
member.summary: Gets the name:Value of MTT variables.
